description: Style Note This kurti from aurelia embodies a relaxed aesthetic that incorporates subtly ethnic design details. Balance the sober patterns with a bright colour pop denims or an intricate stole. We recommend ethnic flats in metallic tones for your feet. Product Details Rust coloured sleeveless kurti, has a mandarin collar with a split neckline, a buttoned placket and slit sides Material and Care 100% cotton  Wash dark colours separately Do not bleach Dry inside out in shade Warm iron Size and Fit Regular fit The model (height 5'8" and chest 33") is wearing a size M Style NoteThis kurti from Aurelia embodies a relaxed aesthetic that incorporates subtly ethnic design details.
